wiki.summary: "Guillotine" is a single released by the experimental hip-hop group Death Grips on April 27, 2011 to promote the "Exmilitary" mixtape they released that year. The track was produced by Andy Morin & Zach Hill. They released a music video for the track and it ended up becoming the channel's most popular video. Read more on Last.fm.
